text_original: this is very entertaining it feels so real I'm drawn in and almost forget it's not real thank you very much PV
text_zh: 这非常有趣，感觉如此真实，我被深深吸引，几乎忘了这不是真的。非常感谢 PV。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your journey and to know that our characters feel so real to you. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going. We will keep working hard to create even more magical memories for you! If you ever need help, contact support@fantachat.ai. Stay awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您旅程的一部分，并得知我们的角色对您来说感觉如此真实，这真是我们的荣幸。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力。我们将继续努力，为您创造更多奇妙的回忆！如果您需要任何帮助，请联系 support@fantachat.ai。保持出色！
